chain.thought: Explanation: In the 2011 column, all schools have a score except for Theodore Roosevelt High School, which has a blank entry indicating no API reported for 2011.

judge_thought: Explanation: In the 2011 column, all schools have an API value except for Theodore Roosevelt High School, which has a blank entry. This blank indicates a missing (null) API value for 2011. Therefore, representing the school with no 2011 API as “null” aligns with the table’s data showing a null (absent) value for that year.
